mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bio_sample ( creator, create_time, updater, update_time, deleted, tenant_id, layer, column_num, freezer_no, drawer_no, box_no, tube_seq, position_code, tube_no, sample_type, operator_id, status, storage_time, out_time, sample_name, sample_source, sample_volume, sample_concentration, expiration_date, notes, time_point ) VALUES
( #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updater}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleted}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.layer}, #{item.columnNum}, #{item.freezerNo}, #{item.drawerNo}, #{item.boxNo}, #{item.tubeSeq}, #{item.positionCode}, #{item.tubeNo}, #{item.sampleType}, #{item.operatorId}, #{item.status}, #{item.storageTime}, #{item.outTime}, #{item.sampleName}, #{item.sampleSource}, #{item.sampleVolume}, #{item.sampleConcentration}, #{item.expirationDate}, #{item.notes}, #{item.timePoint} )
mapper.select: SELECT freezer_no AS freezerNo, layer AS layer, column_num AS columnNum, drawer_no AS drawerNo, box_no AS boxNo, box_seq AS boxSeq, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT sample_type) AS sampleTypes, CASE -- 新增条件：如果组中全部的timePoint都等于5，返回'other' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN time_point = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'other' -- 如果所有sample_type都为NULL，返回NULL WHEN COUNT(sample_type) = 0 THEN 'other' -- 如果只有一种非NULL的sample_type，返回映射后的值 WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sample_type IN ('u', 'u1', 'u2', 'u3') THEN 'urine' WHEN sample_type IN ('t', 't1', 't2', 't3') THEN 'saliva' WHEN sample_type IN ('s', 's1', 's2', 's3') THEN 'blood_serum' WHEN sample_type IN ('p', 'p1', 'p2', 'p3') THEN 'blood_plasma' WHEN sample_type IN ('b', 'b1', 'b2', 'b3') THEN 'blood_whole' WHEN sample_type IN ('w', 'w1', 'w2', 'w3') THEN 'blood_granulocyte' WHEN sample_type IN ('r', 'r1', 'r2', 'r3') THEN 'blood_erythrocyte' WHEN sample_type LIKE 's%' OR sample_type LIKE 'p%' OR sample_type LIKE 'b%' OR sample_type LIKE 'w%' OR sample_type LIKE 'r%' THEN 'blood_other' ELSE sample_type END ) = 1 THEN MAX( CASE WHEN sample_type IN ('u', 'u1', 'u2', 'u3') THEN 'urine' WHEN sample_type IN ('t', 't1', 't2', 't3') THEN 'saliva' WHEN sample_type IN ('s', 's1', 's2', 's3') THEN 'blood_serum' WHEN sample_type IN ('p', 'p1', 'p2', 'p3') THEN 'blood_plasma' WHEN sample_type IN ('b', 'b1', 'b2', 'b3') THEN 'blood_whole' WHEN sample_type IN ('w', 'w1', 'w2', 'w3') THEN 'blood_granulocyte' WHEN sample_type IN ('r', 'r1', 'r2', 'r3') THEN 'blood_erythrocyte' WHEN sample_type LIKE 's%' OR sample_type LIKE 'p%' OR sample_type LIKE 'b%' OR sample_type LIKE 'w%' OR sample_type LIKE 'r%' THEN 'blood_other' ELSE sample_type END ) -- 其他情况（多种sample_type），返回'混合' ELSE 'mixed' END AS displayColor FROM bio_sample WHERE freezer_no = #{freezerNo} GROUP BY freezer_no, drawer_no, box_no, box_seq, layer, column_num

SELECT CASE WHEN sample_type IN ('u', 'u1', 'u2', 'u3') THEN 'urine' WHEN sample_type IN ('t', 't1', 't2', 't3') THEN 'saliva' WHEN sample_type IN ('p', 'p1', 'p2', 'p3', 's', 's1', 's2', 's3', 'b', 'b1', 'b2', 'b3', 'w', 'w1', 'w2', 'w3', 'r', 'r1', 'r2', 'r3') THEN 'blood' ELSE 'other' END AS sampleType, COUNT(*) as count FROM `bio_sample` WHERE sample_type IS NOT NULL and freezer_no = '急进（前瞻）样本库' GROUP BY CASE WHEN sample_type IN ('u', 'u1', 'u2', 'u3') THEN 'urine' WHEN sample_type IN ('t', 't1', 't2', 't3') THEN 'saliva' WHEN sample_type IN ('p', 'p1', 'p2', 'p3', 's', 's1', 's2', 's3', 'b', 'b1', 'b2', 'b3', 'w', 'w1', 'w2', 'w3', 'r', 'r1', 'r2', 'r3') THEN 'blood' ELSE 'other' END ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT CASE WHEN sample_type IN ('u', 'u1', 'u2', 'u3') THEN 'urine' WHEN sample_type IN ('t', 't1', 't2', 't3') THEN 'saliva' WHEN sample_type IN ('p', 'p1', 'p2', 'p3', 's', 's1', 's2', 's3', 'b', 'b1', 'b2', 'b3', 'w', 'w1', 'w2', 'w3', 'r', 'r1', 'r2', 'r3') THEN 'blood' ELSE 'other' END AS sampleType, COUNT(*) as count FROM `bio_sample` WHERE sample_type IS NOT NULL and freezer_no = '常驻（回顾）样本库' GROUP BY CASE WHEN sample_type IN ('u', 'u1', 'u2', 'u3') THEN 'urine' WHEN sample_type IN ('t', 't1', 't2', 't3') THEN 'saliva' WHEN sample_type IN ('p', 'p1', 'p2', 'p3', 's', 's1', 's2', 's3', 'b', 'b1', 'b2', 'b3', 'w', 'w1', 'w2', 'w3', 'r', 'r1', 'r2', 'r3') THEN 'blood' ELSE 'other' END ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 4
